vulns.description: Requests before 2.20.1 sends the Authorization header to the new host on cross-origin redirect (CVE-2018-18074).
PyYAML before 5.4 allows arbitrary code execution via full_load / FullLoader (CVE-2020-14343).
Django before 3.2.13 is vulnerable to SQL injection via QuerySet.annotate/aggregate/extra (CVE-2022-28346).
